insight: When users report ChatControl "consuming XP levels" or items on a blocked anvil/inventory action, the plugin never modifies XP (no giveExp/setLevel calls in plugin code); cancelling an InventoryClickEvent on a result slot causes a client-side display desync where levels appear spent, and relogging or reopening the inventory restores them. Do not treat the resource loss as a plugin bug, only the wrongly cancelled click.

Through v12.1.13, "Cannot rename items while the chat or you are muted!" fires on any anvil result click where the item already has a custom display name, so muted players cannot repair, enchant or combine named items even without renaming (default Mute.Prevent_Anvil_Renaming: true). Workaround until the #3792 fix ships: set Prevent_Anvil_Renaming: false or grant chatcontrol.bypass.mute.
